title: WA1 4SF, Greencore Prepared Meals Limited: environmental permit issued EPR/BO2226IU/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Greencore Prepared Meals Limited Installation name: Greencore Warrington Permit number: EPR/BO2226IU  "
